items.title: Nvidia对Mira Murati的Thinking Machines实验室进行了"重大投资"。
items.summary: 作为合作的一部分，Thinking Machines Lab还同意部署至少一千兆瓦的Nvidia Vera Rubin系统。
items.title_en: Nvidia makes 'significant investment' in Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab
items.summary_en: As part of the partnership, Thinking Machines Lab has also agreed to deploy at least one gigawatt of Nvidia's Vera Rubin systems.

items.title: 亚马逊加入了Meta、谷歌等巨型公司，发行高达420亿美元的巨额债券。

items.title: 我们对微软的评级进行了调整——并解读波音最新的延迟
items.summary: 每个工作日，投资俱乐部都会发布Homestretch；一个适时的下午更新，正好赶上交易最后一小时。
items.title_en: We're changing our rating on Microsoft — and making sense of Boeing's latest delay

items.title: Meta收购了社交网络平台Moltbook，用于人工智能代理
items.summary: Moltbook是为OpenClaw代理人打造的，OpenClaw创始人Peter Steinberger被OpenAI雇用。
items.title_en: Meta gets into social networks for AI agents with acquisition of viral Moltbook platform
items.summary_en: Moltbook was built for OpenClaw agents, and OpenClaw's founder, Peter Steinberger, was hired by OpenAI.

items.title: 亚马逊计划举行内部会议，深入讨论与人工智能相关的故障
items.summary: 亚马逊表示，最近的基础设施问题部分原因是人工智能辅助的生产变化。
items.title_en: Amazon plans 'deep dive' internal meeting to address AI-related outages
items.summary_en: Amazon said AI-assisted production changes were partly to blame for recent infrastructure issues.

items.title: 亚马逊获得法院命令，阻止Perplexity的AI购物代理
items.summary: 亚马逊在11月起诉了Perplexity，指控该初创公司隐瞒了其AI购物代理。
items.title_en: Amazon wins court order to block Perplexity's AI shopping agent
items.summary_en: Amazon sued Perplexity in November, accusing the startup of concealing its AI shopping agents.

items.title: 谷歌加深了与美国国防部的AI合作关系，随后Anthropic对特朗普政府提起诉讼。
items.summary: 谷歌正在推出一个功能，允许民间和军方人员在国防部企业AI门户上为未分类工作创建定制AI代理。
items.title_en: Google deepens Pentagon AI push after Anthropic sues Trump administration
items.summary_en: Google is rolling out a feature that lets civilian and military personnel build custom AI agents for unclassified work on the Pentagon's enterprise AI portal.

items.title: 瑞典法律科技公司Legora valuation达到了5亿美元，投资者纷纷向欧洲人工智能初创公司倾注资金。
items.summary: 欧洲人工智能公司周初表现出色。
items.title_en: Swedish legaltech Legora hits $5 billion valuation as investors pile money into European AI startups
items.summary_en: The announcement comes on the back of a bumper start to the week for European AI companies.

items.title: 凯文·曼迪亚在2022年将其网络安全公司卖给了谷歌。他有着一笔新鲜的190亿美元用于新项目
items.summary: 麦迪安特(Mandiant)创始人凯文·曼迪亚(Kevin Mandia)在将其前公司卖给谷歌(Google)后仍然专注于网络安全，但现在他转向了人工智能(AI)。
items.title_en: Kevin Mandia sold his cybersecurity company to Google in 2022. He has a fresh $190 million for a new venture
items.summary_en: Mandiant founder Kevin Mandia is staying in cybersecurity after selling his prior company to Google, but now he's focused on AI.

items.title: 甲骨文财报将揭示其高昂人工智能押注是否开始见效
items.summary: 甲骨文公司与OpenAI达成3000亿美元的交易，确立了其在人工智能云计算领域的重要地位，与亚马逊、谷歌和微软并驾齐驱。
items.title_en: Oracle earnings will show whether its expensive AI bet is starting to pay off
items.summary_en: Oracle's $300 billion deal with OpenAI established it as a major player in AI cloud computing alongside Amazon, Google and Microsoft.

items.title: Nvidia计划为企业推出开源AI代理平台“NemoClaw”。
items.summary: Nvidia计划利用当前的AI代理热潮，推出一个名为“NemoClaw”的开源AI代理平台。

items.summary_en: Nvidia is planning to lean into the agentic AI craze and launch an open-source platform for AI agents called 'NemoClaw,' according to a report.

items.title: Anthropic被美国国防部选为人工智能合作伙伴，如今却被禁用，专家们开始担忧。
items.summary: Anthropic与亚马逊和帕拉提尔的合作帮助其在DOD取得了进展，但其被列入黑名单引起了许多行业专家的关注。
items.title_en: Anthropic was the Pentagon's choice for AI. Now it's banned and experts are worried
items.summary_en: Anthropic's partnerships with Amazon and Palantir helped it make inroads into the DOD, and its blacklisting is concerning to many industry experts.

items.title: OpenAI将收购安全性初创公司Promptfoo以更好地保护AI代理
items.summary: Promptfoo团队将加入Sam Altman领导的OpenAI，技术将整合到AI代理平台Frontier中。
items.title_en: OpenAI to buy cybersecurity startup Promptfoo to better safeguard AI agents
items.summary_en: Promptfoo's team will join Sam Altman-led OpenAI, and its technology will be integrated into the Frontier platform for AI agents.

items.title: 微软推出高价 Office 等级，Copilot作为其试图通过 AI 增强销售的努力
items.summary: 微软365E7包含Copilot，以及身份、管理和安全功能，这些功能可能会让更多的企业采用AI。

items.summary_en: Microsoft 365 E7 comes with Copilot, as well as identity, management and security features that might make more businesses adopt AI.
